summary: SettingsPageLayout harmonization testing complete. All 6 settings pages (/settings, /settings/profile, /settings/workspace, /settings/integrations, /settings/payment, /settings/wallet) now use consistent layout with identical styling.

settingsPageLayout_consistency: ✅ Settings hub (/settings) - title 'Paramètres' with text-2xl font-bold, description with text-sm text-slate-500, max-w-4xl container, bg-background, 5 cards displayed
✅ Profile (/settings/profile) - title 'Mon profil', 'Enregistrer' button aligned right of title, max-w-4xl, bg-background
✅ Workspace (/settings/workspace) - title 'Workspace', workspace dropdown aligned right of title, max-w-4xl, bg-background
✅ Integrations (/settings/integrations) - title 'Intégrations', max-w-4xl, bg-background, text-2xl font-bold title
✅ Payment (/settings/payment) - title 'Paiement', NO icon before title (CreditCard icon removed), max-w-4xl, bg-background
✅ Wallet (/settings/wallet) - title 'Wallet', NO icon before title (Wallet icon removed), max-w-4xl, bg-background
layout_elements: ✅ All pages use max-w-4xl container width (not max-w-2xl or max-w-3xl)
✅ All titles use text-2xl font-bold text-slate-900
✅ All pages have mb-8 spacing after description
✅ AppBreadcrumb present on all pages with correct paths
breadcrumb_navigation: ✅ Breadcrumb 'Tableau de bord' link navigates to /dashboard
action_buttons: ✅ Profile page: 'Enregistrer' button aligned right of title
✅ Profile save button disabled when no changes
✅ Profile save button enables after making changes
✅ Workspace page: workspace dropdown aligned right of title
✅ Workspace dropdown opens and shows workspace list
icon_removal: ✅ Payment page: NO CreditCard icon before title (was present before refactor)
✅ Wallet page: NO Wallet icon before title (was present before refactor)

critical_code_review_comments: SettingsPageLayout component correctly implements reusable layout with navbar, breadcrumb, title, description, and optional action slot
All 6 settings pages now use consistent styling - no more variants (max-w-2xl/3xl, bg-slate-50, icons before titles, text-xs)
context_for_next_testing_agent: SettingsPageLayout harmonization complete. All /settings/* pages now use identical layout: AppNavbar, AppBreadcrumb, max-w-4xl container, text-2xl font-bold title, text-sm text-slate-500 description, mb-8 spacing, bg-background. Icons before titles removed from Payment and Wallet pages. Action buttons (save, dropdown) aligned right of title.
screenshots: .screenshots/settings_profile_final.png - Profile page with save button aligned right
